prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低位次分别为约7335名、7232名、9046名、8391名、8339名。2023年出现明显后移（9046名），近两年（2024–2025）稳定在8300–8400名区间，2025年基准约8339名，整体呈波动中略有后移态势；该校在天津市综合类招生计划：2021年68人、2022年68人、2023年67人、2024年67人、2025年70人、2026年75人。2026年较2025年扩招5人（增幅约7.1%），扩招使竞争面扩大，位次数字有增大压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第54名，近年排名在48–55名区间波动，整体处于中上211水平；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及一起校园周边安全事件，但该事件性质特殊，对正常报考心理影响有限；抖音综合热度排名第98位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量不高，未出现明显报考热度信号；2021–2025年投档异常文件中未出现该校断档记录，录取走势相对平稳；材料科学与工程（A）、交通运输工程（A-）、机械工程（A-）为代表性优势学科，与该校理工类定位一致，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势工科方向吻合；2026年天津市高考考生总数约82000人（较2025年71938人增长约14%），考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年扩招约7.1%、本省考生总数大幅增长约14%以及学校声誉平稳等因素，在2025年基准8339名基础上，扩招使位次后移，考生规模扩大进一步加剧竞争，预计2026年最低位次约8746名，区间8246–9246名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、电子科学与技术、通信工程）
- 自动化类/电气工程及其自动化
- 人工智能。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类（车辆/智能制造）
- 材料类
- 交通运输类
- 数学类/光电信息科学与工程
- 经济学类/数字经济。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类
- 外国语言文学类
- 法学类
- 网络与新媒体/新闻传播学类
- 化工与制药类（含生物方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约8746名，区间8246–9246名。位次在区间下限8246名以内可重点冲刺一档计算机类、电子信息类等热门工科专业；位次在区间中段（约8500–9000名）建议以 二档机械类、材料类、交通运输类为主力，搭配一档专业冲刺；位次在区间上限附近（约9000名以上）建议以三档专业保底，同时可关注二档中位次要求相对较低的专业 。该校材料科学与工程（A）为最强学科，但受"生化环材"整体社会热度偏冷影响，报考竞争相对温和，适合对材料方向有兴趣的考生作为性价比之选。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Tianjin Comprehensive category were approximately 7335, 7232, 9046, 8391, and 8339 respectively. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (9046), and in the recent two years (2024–2025), it stabilized in the 8300–8400 range, with a baseline of about 8339 in 2025, showing a slight backward trend amid fluctuations. The enrollment plan for this university in Tianjin Comprehensive category: 68 in 2021, 68 in 2022, 67 in 2023, 67 in 2024, 70 in 2025, and 75 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an expansion of 5 students (an increase of about 7.1%), which broadens the competition and puts upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 54th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 48 and 55, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly due to a campus-related safety incident, but the nature of this incident is special and has limited impact on normal application psychology. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 98th, rated as 'average,' with low exposure on short video platforms and no obvious signal of application heat. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of this university in the abnormal filing documents, indicating a relatively stable admission trend. Materials Science and Engineering (A), Transportation Engineering (A-), and Mechanical Engineering (A-) are representative advantageous disciplines, consistent with the university's science and engineering orientation, and have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's advantageous engineering fields. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Tianjin is about 82,000 (an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 7.1%, the significant increase of about 14% in the number of local candidates, and the stable university reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 8339, the expansion will shift the ranking backward, and the increase in candidate numbers will further intensify competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be about 8746, with a range of 8246–9246.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Automation/Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration
- Foreign Languages and Literature
- Law
- Network and New Media/Journalism and Communication
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering (including biological direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 8746, with a range of 8246–9246. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 8246 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. Those in the mid-range (about 8500–9000) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science, and Transportation Engineering, while also attempting Tier 1 majors. Candidates near the upper limit (above 9000) should consider Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with relatively lower ranking requirements. The university's strongest discipline, Materials Science and Engineering (A), is relatively less competitive due to the overall social coolness of the 'biology, chemistry, environment, materials' fields, making it a cost-effective choice for students interested in materials.
